question: Will my Hantavirus tracking website go viral?
reason: Limited public interest in hantavirus outbreaks and niche appeal of the website suggest low viral potential.
evidence: Recent hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship with 11 cases and 3 deaths
Public health risk from outbreak assessed as low by WHO
Limited media coverage of hantavirus outbreaks
Niche nature of hantavirus information may not attract mass audience
raw: {"yes_probability": 0.1, "confidence": "medium", "short_reason": "Limited public interest in hantavirus outbreaks and niche appeal of the website suggest low viral potential.", "key_evidence": ["Recent hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship with 11 cases and 3 deaths", "Public health risk from outbreak assessed as low by WHO", "Limited media coverage of hantavirus outbreaks", "Niche nature of hantavirus information may not attract mass audience"], "source_urls": ["https://www.who.int/emergencies/disease-outbreak-news/item/2026-DON601", "https://www.washingtonpost.com/health/2026/05/19/hantavirus-ship-quarantine-andes-virus/0562acb6-53a8-11f1-9c40-7a0a12d9e745_story.html", "https://www.washingtonpost.com/health/2026/05/07/hantavirus-outbreak-cruise-tracing-contacts/"]}
